protein_name: May function as a testis specific transcription factor. Binds DNA in conjunction with GTF2A2 and TBP (the TATA-binding protein) and together with GTF2A2, allows mRNA transcription. Belongs to the TFIIA subunit 1 family. Testis specific. Detected in adult testis mostly in round and elongating spermatids (at protein level). Detected in testis. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: cognition; positive regulation of DNA-templated transcription; transcription by RNA polymerase II; transcription initiation at RNA polymerase II promoter
